title: Bacterial Liquid Carbon Free Media
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3v4n2","text":"A simple protocol for the creation of a basic carbon free minimal media for bacterial growth. This is not an optimised protocol for growth, it is the base media to which different carbon sources can be added to detect bacterial growth and therefore metabolism of added carbon sources. The media can be used for liquid cultures, or combined with agar for solid media.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"c857j","text":"Can adapt any of the volumes for your requirements. Also you can use whatever other glass vessels for mixing or autoclaving that you prefer or are available.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"da4k5","text":"Always remember when autoclaving to use a larger glass vessel than the volume you want to autoclave to avoid it boiling over. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4lnql","text":"Always remember to leave the bottle caps loose on bottles when autoclaving! ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"821i4","text":"Always wear gloves and goggles when handling the 0.1 M HCl.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Add the following salts to a 500 mL beaker: 27.5 g Na 2 HPO 4 •5H 2 O 7.5 g KH 2 PO 4 1.25 g NaCl 2.5 g NH 4 Cl
Add 400 mL dH 2 O and stir with a magnetic stirrer until dissolved
Once fully dissolved, make up to 500 mL with dH 2 O
Add the following to a 100 mL beaker: 0.14 g FeSO 4 •7H 2 O 0.12 g MnSO 4 •5H 2 O 0.12 g CuSO 4 •5H 2 O 0.14 g ZnSO 4 •7H 2 O
Add 40 mL 0.1 M HCl and stir with a magnetic stirrer until dissolved
Once fully dissolved, make up to 50 mL with 0.1 M HCl
Move into a sterilised laminar flow hood and filter sterilise through 0.22 μm pore using a syringe into a sterile falcon tube
Add the following to a 100 mL beaker: 12.3 g MgSO 4 •7H 2 O
Add 40 mL dH 2 O and stir with a magnetic stirrer until dissolved
Once fully dissolved, make up to 50 mL with dH 2 O
Move into a sterilised laminar flow hood and filter sterilise through 0.22 μm pore using a syringe into a sterile falcon tube
Add the following to a 100 mL beaker: 7.35 g CaCl 2
Add 40 mL dH 2 O and stir with a magnetic stirrer until dissolved
Once fully dissolved, make up to 50 mL with dH 2 O
Move into a sterilised laminar flow hood and filter sterilise through 0.22 μm pore using a syringe into a sterile falcon tube
Make up to 400 mL with dH 2 O
Swirl to mix and the media is now ready for use.
In a laminar flowhood, filter sterilise the solution using a sterile syringe and 0.22 μm pore filters into an autoclaved 500 mL bottle.
Combine the following in a 500 mL bottle: 40 mL 10X M9 Salts 0.4 mL 1000X Trace Metals
Autoclave
Once cool, in a sterilised laminar flow hood add the following with sterile pipette tips: 0.8 mL 1 M MgSO 4 80 μL 1 M CaCl 2
creator: Conor James Richard Scott
